elon_musk.appearance: tall muscular build, short brown hair, clean shaven or light stubble, strong jawline
elon_musk.default_setting: dark industrial SpaceX facility with rocket components
elon_musk.default_outfit: black t-shirt or dark navy suit, no tie
elon_musk.lighting: dramatic side lighting with golden tones from the left
elon_musk.mood_negative: jaw clenched, eyes narrowed with intensity, furrowed brow
elon_musk.mood_positive: confident smirk, arms crossed, chin slightly raised

sam_altman.appearance: shorter build, curly brown hair, clean shaven, youthful face, blue eyes
sam_altman.default_setting: modern minimalist tech office with glass walls
sam_altman.default_outfit: casual button-down shirt, no tie, or light navy blazer
sam_altman.lighting: cool blue ambient light mixed with warm side light
sam_altman.mood_negative: tight-lipped, cold defiant stare, hands clasped
sam_altman.mood_neutral: calm composed expression, direct eye contact

jerome_powell.appearance: silver gray hair, tall, serious face, clean shaven
jerome_powell.default_setting: Federal Reserve boardroom with dark wood paneling and Fed seal on wall
jerome_powell.default_outfit: dark navy suit, white dress shirt, dark tie
jerome_powell.lighting: golden chandelier light from above casting sharp shadows
jerome_powell.mood_negative: defiant expression, jaw tight, hands clasped on table
jerome_powell.mood_neutral: stoic composed expression, looking directly at camera

mark_zuckerberg.appearance: short brown curly hair, pale complexion, slim build, youthful face
mark_zuckerberg.default_outfit: dark navy suit or gray t-shirt
mark_zuckerberg.lighting: cold blue tech lighting with golden accents
mark_zuckerberg.mood_neutral: flat expression, direct unblinking eye contact

donald_trump.appearance: tall broad shoulders, blonde hair swept back, tan complexion
donald_trump.default_setting: Oval Office or Mar-a-Lago grand ballroom with golden chandeliers
donald_trump.default_outfit: dark navy suit, long red tie, white dress shirt
donald_trump.lighting: warm golden ambient light, dramatic side shadows
donald_trump.mood_negative: stern frown, pointing finger, leaning forward

dario_amodei.appearance: curly dark brown hair, glasses, medium build

dario_amodei.default_outfit: dark navy suit, no tie, top button open
dario_amodei.lighting: red and amber warning lights mixed with golden side light

satya_nadella.default_outfit: dark navy suit, blue dress shirt, no tie

satya_nadella.mood_positive: warm genuine smile, open hand gestures
